title: cynoglossum schlumbergeri
intro: Cynoglossum schlumbergeri, also known as Schlumberger's Hound's Tongue, is a flowering plant species in the borage family (Boraginaceae) that is native to the mountains of Central Asia. The medicinal properties of Cynoglossum schlumbergeri include its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties, which make it useful in treating various health issues. The plant is believed to have several health benefits, including reducing fever, treating respiratory problems, and acting as an expectorant to relieve coughs. In traditional medicine, herbal preparations of Cynoglossum schlumbergeri are often made into infusions, decoctions, or dried and used in various forms to harness its medicinal properties.
